name: All American Barbecued Beans
recipeIngredient: 1 slice fat-free turkey bacon, cut into 1-inch pieces
15 1/2 ounces great northern beans, canned, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook bacon pieces in a medium saucepan over medium-high heat for four minutes.
2. Add onions and cook until the bacon is crisp and onions are tender.
3. In a small bowl, combine ketchup, white vinegar, water, mustard, Worcestershire sauce, salt, black pepper, and beans.
4. Reduce heat and simmer, covered, until flavors are blended, about 20 minutes.
5. Add sweetener.
